creator: lacombar@gmail.com
text:
ichwd(4) should be silent after boot, especially if `bootverbose' is set to 1.

Fix: 

Properly use sysctl(8) .hw tree to report event count and/or to control the debug level.
How-To-Repeat:  - build ichwd(4)
 - `boot -v' on an ichwd-supported platform
 - start `watchdogd'
